case_title: RICHARD JAMES BRENNER ET AL VS. JAMES HAYES ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-31-2024 - JUDGMENT.

PROOF OF SERVICE OF APPLICATION FOR ORDER TO PRODUCE STATEMENT OF ASSETS AND TO APPEAR FOR EXAMINATION SERVICE FEE: $50.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRENNER, RICHARD JAMES BRENNER, BARBARA ELLEN SERVED SEP-19-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HAYES, JAMES

THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT, PER REQUEST OF THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR. PLAINTIFF RIHCARD JAMES BRENNER IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF BARBARA ELLEN BRENNER IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANTS JAMES HAYES AND VICTORIA HAYES ARE NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,017.59 FILED BY BRENNER, RICHARD JAMES BRENNER, BARBARA ELLEN AS TO DEFENDANT HAYES, JAMES HAYES, VICTORIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-31-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRENNER, RICHARD JAMES BRENNER, BARBARA ELLEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HAYES, JAMES $4,017.59 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,067.59 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-31-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-31-2024 BY VISITING JUDGE. PLAINTIFFS RICHARD BRENNER AND BARBARA BRENNER ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT VICTORIA HAYES IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT JAMES HAYES IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS DISMISS THEIR CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT VICTORIA HAYES. DEFENDANT JAMES HAYES WAIVES SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY; CLERK: C. CHENG. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER OF EXAMINATION (REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRENNER, RICHARD JAMES BRENNER, BARBARA ELLEN AS TO DEFENDANT HAYES, JAMES
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT HAYES, JAMES HEARING SET FOR NOV-14-2024 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
